title: On Wat.
content:
Sic a reptile was Wat,
            Sic a miscreant slave,
        That the very worms damn'd him
            When laid in his grave.
        "In his flesh there's a famine,"
            A starv'd reptile cries;
        "An' his heart is rank poison,"
            Another replies.
meaning:
"On Wat." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
